headline: We Don’t Just Wash It. We Restore It to Photoshoot Ready.
soul_lead: Petito’s Detailing is the trusted, meticulous restoration partner for Sanford truck and SUV owners who demand flawless paint correction, ceramic protection, and a photoshoot-ready finish delivered with consistent communication and 15-year reliability.
diffs: Fixes dealer-induced swirl damage and applies protective ceramic coatings
Commands 15+ years of repeat loyalty from customers who treat their vehicles like prized possessions
Operates both a professional two-location Sanford shop and a full mobile detailing service
Specializes in high-gloss paint restoration and wheel/tire detailing for trucks and SUVs
Known for proactive communication, punctuality, and accommodating scheduling flexibility

reviews.name: Michelle Wyatt
reviews.text: Provided great service and communication. My black mustang looks great after the exterior detailing. I will use them again!

reviews.name: Shawn Miller
reviews.text: Pat, and his team did a great job detailing my Cadillac XT5.

reviews.name: MrJoe2983
reviews.text: Awesome work on detailing my vehicles.

reviews.name: Bill Flynn
reviews.text: Pat did a great job! He is very professional knowledgeable and easy to deal with. I would recommend Petito’s detailing for any detailing need you have

reviews.name: Verified customer
reviews.text: I recently had my truck detailed by Petito’s Detailing, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. From start to finish, the experience was smooth and professional. They paid incredible attention to detail every inch of my truck from inside and out, looks spotless. Everything is
